summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Music Video Factory app - all requested features working perfectly. API key save fix verified, 7-step wizard fully functional with proper navigation, templates, and project creation flow.
passed_tests: Backend API health check (14/14 endpoints working)
User authentication with JWT httpOnly cookies
API key save functionality with green checkmark persistence
API key status persists after page reload
Step 1 Song Input: Title, Genre, Lyrics inputs functional
6 templates displayed and clickable with selection feedback
Next/Back button navigation between wizard steps
Cost counter visible and updating ($0.00 USD)
Project creation flow from wizard Step 1 to Step 2
Cost tracker table with empty state display
Mocked APIs working with placeholder functionality
